title: Senior Credit Risk Manager
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • To review and summarize applications for new loan exposures, obligor grading and credit strategy for a portfolio of Project and Structured Finance transactions in the Renewables, Digital Media, Infrastructure, Transportation and Energy sectors.
  • To independently review and assess several types of credit applications submitted by business units
  • To prepare concise and adequate executive summary to seek approval from relevant authorities
  • To analyse the creditworthiness of borrowers, project developers, sponsors, and corporate entities involved in each transaction.
  • To establish an adequate action plan for credits likely to deteriorate to minimize credit costs
  • To manage and maintain the accuracy of registration of credit monitoring system and client database, and to instruct business units to modify data if necessary
  • To conduct credit portfolio analysis in terms of countries, corporate groups, industry commodity / segments, currency risks, internal grading, type of financial product, etc. from time to time
  • To monitor and proactively control credit exposures under large scale companies and/or certain sectors for increased concern on concentration risks, in cooperation with other relevant teams / departments
  • To discuss direction of potential deals with business units following head office’s credit policy and credit appetite

Requirements:

  • Min. 7 years of experience in Credit Analysis or Risk Management preferably within Project Finance and/or in the Energy and Infrastructure sector
  • Strong working experience in assessing and managing credit risk for large-scale projects
  • Strong ability in articulating complicated financing transactions and implied risks in a clear and concise manner to a diverse range of stakeholders
  • Bachelor's degree or professional qualification in a related field, e.g. degree in finance and accounting or economics.

If you have the relevant experience, please email a detailed résumé in Word Doc to andrea.sze@searchasia.com.sg.

Additionally, please feel free to contact Andrea Sze (R1438720) for a more detailed discussion at 6735 5885.


Sze Qi Yun, Andrea
Principal Specialist Recruiter
(Banking & Financial Services)

Our proven search process and broad industry expertise have enabled successful placements in many global multinational companies and Asian conglomerates in key Asian cities including Singapore, Hong Kong, Beijing, Shanghai, Kuala Lumpur and Jakarta.
